excerpt: Dental coverage is offered as part of some SHOP health plans, but not all of them. If you're looking for dental coverage, preview 2024 SHOP plans and prices.
content:
Dental coverage is offered as part of some SHOP health plans, but not all of them. If you're looking for dental coverage, preview 2024 SHOP plans and prices. (Stand-alone dental plans offered through the SHOP Marketplace are separate dental plans that employees can buy when they buy a SHOP Marketplace health plan at the same time.) 

You can download data for 2024 SHOP dental plans: 

  • Instructions (PDF, 163 KB) 
  • 2024 SHOP dental plan data (ZIP file, 73.2 KB)

You can also get: 

  • 2024 SHOP health plan information for small businesses
  • 2023 SHOP dental plan information 

Learn more about the Affordable Care Act.
